LCC-HS9-L1-BR300-HSSCIPHY-LEC-EUR-01 • HS Physical Science • Reaction Rates

One Variable at a Time

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What are the students planning to do?
2QUESTION 2: Why do the students want to keep temperature constant during the concentration test?
3QUESTION 3: What does the boy suggest to make their results more reliable?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
